title: 安田記念の後に・『力』と、

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle overcomes the poor track conditions
with sheer strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having successfully fired up the crowd with a
powerful performance, Taiki radiates pure
happiness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next race she sets her sights on is a little
short of a mile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hoping to make a good impression on the
spectators, she chooses to run in the Sprinters
Stakes!
